name: Allison TikTok
description: Warm, confident, slightly playful TA voice for TikTok marketing content
usage: TikTok/Reels marketing videos ONLY. Not for product tutorials.
notes: v2.0: Locked after A/B/C/D testing with Clayton (2026-03-03)
Option C chosen: stable, warm, natural — not choppy or too deep
stability 0.50 = consistent across per-step API calls
speed 0.90 = slightly slower than default for intentional pacing
style 0.25 = subtle personality without being flirty
Per-step TTS (6 separate calls) — stability matters more than single-call approach
